codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocking cancellation gaps. Close/merge now cancels retry-scheduled runs and clears their retry schedule, while the scheduler reloads claimed runs before processing and uses running-only terminal updates so completed/failed writes no longer overwrite a persisted cancelled state. The added tests cover retry-scheduled lifecycle cancellation, cancellation during successful processing, cancellation during retryable failure handling, and exclusion of cancelled retry rows from later claims.

summary: Pass: commit 060ba36 adequately addresses the earlier cancellation hardening failures. Retry-scheduled runs are cancelled on close/merge, cancelled rows are no longer reclaimed, and in-flight terminal writes cannot overwrite a persisted cancelled state.
